reviews.title: Customer reviews
reviews.review1: Perfect packaging, very discreet. Product matches the description, great build quality. Fast delivery.
reviews.review2: Happy with my purchase. Quality is there and customer service answered my questions quickly.
reviews.review3: Excellent value for money. Sturdy, well-finished product, intuitive to use. Highly recommended.
reviews.delivery_text: Plain packaging, no content indication. Ships within 24 hours.
reviews.warranty_text: All our products come with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty.
reviews.returns_text: Free returns within 30 days, no questions asked.

care.title: Care & use
care.lingerie_text: Hand wash or machine wash at 30 °C on a delicate cycle. Do not bleach or use fabric softener. Dry flat, away from direct light.
care.accessories_text: Clean with mild soap or a dedicated toy cleaner before and after each use. Rinse thoroughly and dry carefully. Compatible only with water-based lubricants, unless otherwise stated.
care.lubricants_text: Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and direct light. Check the expiry date before use. Once opened, use within 12 months.
